nodes.label: graphify
nodes.rationale: Turns any folder of code, docs, papers, images, or video into a navigable knowledge graph with community detection and an honest audit trail.

nodes.label: Fast Path for Existing Graph
nodes.rationale: Skip Steps 1-5 and jump straight to query when graphify-out/graph.json already exists and the user asks a natural-language codebase question.

nodes.label: AST Extraction
nodes.rationale: Deterministic, free structural extraction for code files; runs in parallel with semantic extraction.

nodes.label: Semantic Extraction
nodes.rationale: LLM-based extraction for docs, papers, and images; dispatches parallel subagents when no Gemini key is set.

nodes.label: Subagent
nodes.rationale: General-purpose agents process chunks of 20-25 non-code files in parallel during semantic extraction.

nodes.label: Gemini API
nodes.rationale: Optional backend for semantic extraction; graphify needs no API key and falls back to the host agent.

nodes.label: Incremental Update
nodes.rationale: Re-extracts only new or changed files via --update to save tokens and time.

nodes.label: Cluster-Only
nodes.rationale: Reruns clustering on the existing graph without re-extraction.

nodes.label: Directed Graph
nodes.rationale: Optional --directed flag preserves edge direction source-to-target.

nodes.label: Graph Health Check
nodes.rationale: Read-only integrity gate before labeling that surfaces dangling endpoints, missing endpoints, self-loops, and collapsed edges.

nodes.label: Honesty Rules
nodes.rationale: Audit-trail rules: never invent an edge, never skip the corpus check warning, always show token cost, never hide cohesion scores, warn on large HTML viz.

nodes.label: Watch Mode
nodes.rationale: Auto-rebuild on file changes; code-only changes need no LLM, doc/image changes flag needs_update.

nodes.label: Add URL
nodes.rationale: Fetch a URL into ./raw and then run --update to merge it into the graph.

nodes.label: spawn_agent
nodes.rationale: Codex-specific worker dispatch used instead of the Agent tool; requires multi_agent feature enabled.

nodes.label: Node ID Format
nodes.rationale: Deterministic lowercase IDs using immediate parent dir plus filename stem, matching the AST extractor to prevent ghost duplicates.

nodes.label: Confidence Rubric
nodes.rationale: Discrete scores (1.0, 0.95, 0.85, 0.75, 0.65, 0.55, 0.1-0.3) instead of a continuous range to avoid collapse to 0.5.

nodes.label: Hyperedge
nodes.rationale: Group relationship for 3+ nodes sharing a concept, flow, or pattern not captured by pairwise edges alone.

nodes.label: Semantic Similarity
nodes.rationale: Non-obvious cross-file links between concepts that solve the same problem without structural imports, calls, or citations.

nodes.label: Vocabulary Expansion
nodes.rationale: Expand the user's question against the graph's own vocabulary before traversal to avoid wording mismatches.

nodes.label: save-result Feedback
nodes.rationale: Persist query/path/explain answers back into the graph so future --update extracts them as nodes.

nodes.label: Whisper Transcription
nodes.rationale: Transcribe video/audio to text before semantic extraction; uses a one-sentence domain hint derived from god nodes.

nodes.label: build_merge
nodes.rationale: Preserves edge direction during incremental merge and prunes genuinely deleted files by source path.

nodes.label: confidence rubric
nodes.rationale: The rubric discretizes confidence into EXTRACTED=1.0 and INFERRED values of 0.95/0.85/0.75/0.65/0.55 to avoid collapsing to a binary.

nodes.label: Apex Brand
nodes.rationale: Brand name and logo visible in the top-left corner of the dashboard preview.

nodes.label: Hero Neural Background Image
nodes.rationale: Hero section background image depicting an abstract neural network of glowing cyan nodes and connections, used to convey AI-driven career matching.

nodes.label: Neural Network
nodes.rationale: The dominant visual motif of the hero background, representing intelligent connection and pattern matching.

nodes.label: Career Matching Theme
nodes.rationale: The neural network imagery implies intelligent connection between candidates and job opportunities.

nodes.label: Resume Template Preview
nodes.rationale: Marketing preview image showing a sample resume layout for the CareerSync application.
